content: Sixth reflection — audited all 21 Qdrant curiosity points. Full evolution timeline reconstructed: Phase 1 (external recon) → Phase 2 (libp2p handshake analyzer) → Phase 3 (Noise XX implementation, local validated, live fails at msg2 AEAD) → Phase 4 (Kademlia DHT, blocked by Noise requirement) → Phase 5 (task negotiation protocol) → Phase 6 (full integration). Current state: production coordinator v4 running, experimental lab with 9 modules (1,535 lines), external pipeline mapped end-to-end. Single blocker: Noise wire format compat with go-libp2p's flynn/noise library. The architecture is ready to join external swarms the moment that gap closes.
